zh.Dunure Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努
zh.Castle Dunure, Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotla: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Kennedy於1376年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure28歲，母親Agnes Maxwell18歲。他於1405年與Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年11月8日之前在英國蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Kennedy于1376年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure28岁，母亲Agnes Maxwell18岁。他于1405年与Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年11月8日之前在英国苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Kennedy was born in 1376, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Maxwell, was 18. He married Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus in 1405, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 8 November 1408, in Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Kennedy est né en 1376, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Maxwell, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus en 1405, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 8 novembre 1408, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Kennedy 1376 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure 28 und seine Mutter Agnes Maxwell 18. Er hat 1405 in Scotland Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 8. November 1408 in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Kennedy è nato il nel 1376 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Maxwell, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus nel 1405, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 8 novembre 1408, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Kennedyが1376年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunureは28歳，母Agnes Maxwellは18歳であった。1405年にスコットランドでPrincess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年11月8日以前にイギリススコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Kennedy(이)가 1376년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Maxwell(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1405년 스컷랜드에서 Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 11월 8일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Kennedy nasceu em 1376, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Maxwell, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus em 1405, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 8 de novembro de 1408, em Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Kennedy родился в 1376 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Maxwell, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus в 1405 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 8 ноябрь 1408 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Kennedy nació en 1376, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Maxwell, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus en 1405, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 8 de noviembre de 1408, en Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
